activities.text: Quest complete: The Curse of Arrav

activities.details: I levelled my Constitution skill, I am now level 68.
I've reconstructed the mummy in the pyramid near Uzer, so I can now talk with her and learn ancient secrets.
I levelled my Hunter skill, I am now level 52.
Not a week goes by without Varrock becoming the target of some dark and malevolent force! I've pushed back the waves of zombies and defied Zemouregal.
I levelled my Farming skill, I am now level 30.
Queen Ellamaria isn't a particularly friendly woman, but I think she's delighted with the garden I made for her.
I levelled my Farming skill, I am now level 26.
The crest of the Fitzharmon family was scattered all over Gielinor! Its recovery means Dimintheis's estate is safe.
